faq.ytchatHeader: My youtube chat ish not wogged in!

faq.musicPlayerContent: Fow most ios devices, u cannot tuwn off da scween ow cwose safawi whiwe pwaying howodex music. Dis westwiction may ow may not appwy to andwoid devices (depends on device). Pwease give us feedback on discowd if u have any idea how to pwoduce a bettew pwayback system.
faq.videoLinkage: How do me make suwe that bideos awe winked pwopewwy to vtubews?
faq.videoLinkageContent: Aww infowmation ish pawsed fwom da bideo descwiption. If u awe cwipping a stweam, pwease make suwe to wink da officiaw stweam. If u awe cwipping fan made content (eg. fwom biwibiwi), just make suwe to wink da officiaw youtube channews of wewevant vtubews. If u do not wink any vtubew channews, then we wiww not show that cwip on howodex, as aww cwips wequiwe winkage to a vtubew known to howodex.

feedback.title: Me have feedback/want to contwibute to dis pwoject

contents.0: Aww hewp and ideas awe wewcome! da ui and backend awe both avaiwabwe fow contwibution, awthough onwy da ui ish open souwce cuwwentwy. Pwease contact us on discowd to gain access to backend souwce, ow simpwy chat about youw ideas.

Ouw sewf-hosted sewvew ish a 28-cowe 60gb ram machine that take about $60 usd / mo to wun, and we'we wooking to expanding mowe and mowe in ouw featuwe set, so we've stawted a ko-fi to covew sewvew costs. (we awso have a patweon, but we wike da ko-fi bettew.)

you can awso suppowt howodex by giving us feedback and suppowtive messages on twittew, hewping us twanswate via cwowdin, as weww as contwibuting to ouw data stowe of songs. Even timing a stweam fow funny pawts, and commenting that on da owiginaw stweam ish gweat hewp!

channelRequest.DirectContactDisclaimer: Feew fwee to weave youw discowd id, emaiw ow twittew. In case u need to be contacted (this info wiww stay pwivate) so we can pwovide feedback. Onwy howodex administwatows wiww see dis infowmation.

channelRequest.VtuberRequirementText:
A minyimum of 15K subscwibews is wequiwed fow independents. Vtubews as pawt of existing owgs wiww be accepted.

Nyew Owgs wiww be cweated depending on da avewage subscwibew count.

Twitch stweamews must have an officiaw YouTube channyew to be indexed.

Any mention of "Past-Wives" / awtewnyate identities wiww automaticawwy be wejected.
channelRequest.ClipperRequirementText:
Fow cwippews, it must be at weast 2 months owd and post weguwawwy, ow post mowe than 20 cwips in one month. Spamming of showt cwips evewy day, posting onwy showt <1min cwips, ow using unfwattewing thumbnaiws wiww aww count against da channew. Content quawity might be judged as weww.

it's impowtant to note that cwippews shouwd cite theiw souwces via channew winks, @youtube channew mentions, and bideo winks. Ovewciting (e.g. Linking to evewyone at nijisanji) cweates wowk fow howodex editows, and undewciting (no winks) wiww make cwips hidden.

howodex contains awgowithms to detect ovewciting and cowwect them automaticawwy, but it may not awways wowk pewfectwy. Cwippews who ovewcite may be wemoved fwom pwatfowm to weduce noise.
channelRequest.DeletionRequirementText: Dewetion shouwd onwy be wequested if u awe da channew ownew(s), pwease pwovide contact infowmation so we can vewify dis.
